title: sequencer~

messages.description: signal trigger to generate value from sequence
control trigger to generate value from sequence
impulse when reaching end of sequence

arguments.description: list of floats sets the sequence

methods.description: goes to a position index in the sequence (from 1)

body: When receiving a signal trigger (0 to non-0 transition) or a bang, [sequencer~] sends a signal value from a given sequence.
